name: Fandomatics
description: Fandomatics Norway is a small Stavanger-based fandom community/convention organisation. Its main public footprint is a Facebook page; no working `.no` or `.com` domain was reachable, and it is not listed on RosterCon, FanCons.com, MagiCon's community page, or Cosplay.no's convention index.
notes: Weakest data of all 25 cons in scope. No public website found at fandomatics.no or fandomatics.com (both unreachable / not indexed). Group appears largely Facebook-only and possibly dormant. Ask the user whether to drop from seed data or seed as a placeholder.
